defs: Marked with spots of different shades of color; spotted; variegated; as, a dapple horse.
quotes: Some dapple mists still floated along the peaks.
O, swiftly can speed my dapple-gray steed.
notes: ☞ The word is used in composition to denote that some color is variegated or marked with spots; as, dapple-bay; dapple-gray.
